$uid..validate: auth.token.role === 'instructor' || (newData.hasChildren(['id','nick','submitted']) && newData.child('id').val() === $uid && newData.child('nick').isString() && newData.child('nick').val().length > 0 && newData.child('nick').val().length <= 20 && newData.child('submitted').isNumber())

$round..validate: auth.token.role === 'instructor' || (newData.hasChildren(['pid','round','alloc']) && newData.child('pid').val() === $uid && newData.child('round').val() === root.child('pitgame/sessions/'+$session+'/state/round').val() && newData.child('alloc').hasChildren(['SEC','DATA','SCALE','UX','TRUST','INNO']) && newData.child('alloc/SEC').isNumber() && newData.child('alloc/DATA').isNumber() && newData.child('alloc/SCALE').isNumber() && newData.child('alloc/UX').isNumber() && newData.child('alloc/TRUST').isNumber() && newData.child('alloc/INNO').isNumber() && newData.child('alloc/SEC').val() >= 0 && newData.child('alloc/DATA').val() >= 0 && newData.child('alloc/SCALE').val() >= 0 && newData.child('alloc/UX').val() >= 0 && newData.child('alloc/TRUST').val() >= 0 && newData.child('alloc/INNO').val() >= 0 && newData.child('alloc/SEC').val() + newData.child('alloc/DATA').val() + newData.child('alloc/SCALE').val() + newData.child('alloc/UX').val() + newData.child('alloc/TRUST').val() + newData.child('alloc/INNO').val() === 100)
